name: vscode-copilot-custom-provider
description: A configurable VS Code language model provider backed by an OpenAI Responses API compatible endpoint.

commands.title: Custom OpenAI Responses: Set API Key
Custom OpenAI Responses: Clear API Key

copilotCustomProvider.enabled.description: Enable the custom language model provider.

copilotCustomProvider.profiles.markdownDescription: Endpoint/key groups exposed under this provider. Each profile has its own endpoint, API key stored under the profile id in VS Code SecretStorage, headers, request body overrides, and model list.

id.markdownDescription: Stable profile id. Used to build the default VS Code model id as `profileId/modelId`.

name.description: Human-readable profile name shown in model details and API key commands.

endpoint.markdownDescription: OpenAI Responses API compatible endpoint URL for this profile, for example `https://gateway-a.example.com/v1/responses`.

apiKey.description: API key for this profile. Prefer the Set API Key command, which stores the key in VS Code SecretStorage.

requireApiKey.description: Require an API key before exposing this profile's models.

apiKeyHeader.description: Header name used for this profile's API key.

apiKeyPrefix.markdownDescription: Prefix prepended to this profile's API key header value. Use `Bearer ` for OpenAI-compatible services, or an empty string for raw key headers.

extraHeaders.description: Additional HTTP headers sent for this profile. Values are sent as strings.

requestBodyOverrides.description: Additional JSON body fields merged into every request for this profile.

models.markdownDescription: Models exposed for this profile. `id` and `apiModel` are upstream model identifiers and can repeat across profiles. The VS Code/Copilot id defaults to `profileId/modelId`.

id.description: Upstream model id. Sent to the Responses API when apiModel is omitted.

providerId.markdownDescription: Optional unique id exposed to VS Code/Copilot. Defaults to `profileId/modelId`. Use this only when you need a custom stable picker id.

apiModel.description: Model id sent to the Responses API. Defaults to id.

name.description: Display name shown in the model picker.

endpoint.description: Optional endpoint URL override for this model.

family.description: Model family identifier exposed to VS Code.

version.description: Model version exposed to VS Code.

maxInputTokens.description: Maximum input token budget advertised to VS Code.

maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output token budget advertised to VS Code and sent as max_output_tokens.

toolCalling.description: Advertise tool calling support and forward VS Code tools to the Responses API. A number advertises the maximum number of tools accepted.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort injected into Responses API requests for this model.

temperature.description: Optional temperature sent to the endpoint.

topP.description: Optional top_p sent to the endpoint.

extraBody.description: Additional JSON body fields merged into requests for one model.

copilotCustomProvider.defaultReasoningEf.description: Reasoning effort used when a model does not define its own reasoningEffort.

copilotCustomProvider.enableStreaming.description: Request streaming responses from the endpoint.

copilotCustomProvider.maxRetries.description: Number of retries for failed non-cancelled HTTP requests.

copilotCustomProvider.tokenEstimateChars.description: Approximate characters per token used by provideTokenCount.

copilotCustomProvider.logRequests.description: Write request metadata to the extension output channel. Request bodies and API keys are never logged.

copilotCustomProvider.requestBodyOverrid.description: Additional JSON body fields merged into every Responses API request.
